summary: .NET 5: Received an unexpected EOF or 0 bytes from the transport stream.
Rate limit new connection creations (maxConnecting)
Establish connections in ConnectionPool
description:
Move establishing of new connections to connection pool.
 Ensure that ConnectionPoolCheckedOutConnectionEvent happens after ConnectionOpenedEvent, according to CMAP spec.

summary: x509 Auth with intermediate CA
Iterate over all connections on connection checkout in ConnectionPool
description:
1. Implement the "Pool MUST first iterate over the list of available Connections" part of CMAP spec.
2. Iterate over all connections in PrunePoolAsync

summary: Sporadic tests failures: server_discovery_and_monitoring.tests.integration.isMaster-timeout
description:
server_discovery_and_monitoring.tests.integration.isMaster-timeout fails occasionally 


{code:java}
2021/01/27 10:40:53.521] [xUnit.net 00:01:29.31] MongoDB.Driver.Tests.Specifications.server_discovery_and_monitoring.ServerDiscoveryAndMonitoringIntegrationTestRunner.Run(testCase: MongoDB.Driver.Tests.Specifications.server_discovery_and_monitoring.tests.integration.isMaster-timeout.json:Network timeout on Monitor check:async=True) [FAIL]
 [2021/01/27 10:40:53.522] [xUnit.net 00:01:29.31] System.Exception : Unexpected exception was thrown.
 [2021/01/27 10:40:53.522] [xUnit.net 00:01:29.31] ---- System.Exception : Waiting for 1 ServerMarkedUnknownEvent exceeded the timeout 00:00:10. The number of triggered events is 0.{code}

[example1|https://evergreen.mongodb.com/task/dot_net_driver_unsecure_tests_posix__version~4.4_os~ubuntu_1804_topology~sharded_cluster_auth~noauth_ssl~nossl_test_netstandard21_patch_85a95c33aace3d68ac29c960a7dc27de4940afad_6011b00b32f417547c553301_21_01_27_18_26_28]
[example2|https://evergreen.mongodb.com/task/dot_net_driver_unsecure_tests_posix__version~4.4_os~ubuntu_1804_topology~sharded_cluster_auth~noauth_ssl~nossl_test_netstandard21_patch_85a95c33aace3d68ac29c960a7dc27de4940afad_6011b00b32f417547c553301_21_01_27_18_26_28]

summary: Set different appname in sync and async tests variations
description:
Test which set failpoints and have both sync and async variations, introduce a race condition.
Sometimes a newly set failpoint is consumed by previous variation cleanups. The easiest solution would be to differentiate the tests variations by appname.

summary: Rotate Atlas Dev testing credentials
Update versioned api transaction-handling spec test
Workarounds for killAllSessions in unified test runner
Update serverSelectionTimeoutMS of MongoClient to mongocryptd
Unobserved task exception on connection failure raises its head again
description:
It seems that CSHARP-1628 is with us again. Since upgrading to 2.12.0 we occasionally receive the following exception in our unobserved exception logger:
{code:csharp}System.AggregateException: A Task's exception(s) were not observed either by Waiting on the Task or accessing its Exception property. As a result, the unobserved exception was rethrown by the finalizer thread.
 ---> MongoDB.Driver.MongoConnectionException: An exception occurred while receiving a message from the server.

int System.Net.Sockets.NetworkStream.Read(out byte[] buffer, int offset, int size)

summary: Remove slaveOK connection string option from URI parsing
Require passing Stable API options to getMore and transaction-continuing commands
Stabilize server selection prose test
description: Increase iterations count in [Server selection prose test|https://github.com/mongodb/specifications/blob/master/source/server-selection/server-selection-tests.rst#prose-test] for better stability.

summary: Can't make use of compression when application path contain space
description:
Because of the use or Uri class (don't know why ...), application path containing spaces (e.g. ClickOnce deployed app running on a user account with spaces) produce the following exception when trying to connect to DB with compression enabled:
{quote}System.IO.FileNotFoundException: Could not find library snappy64.dll. Checked C:\Users\User%20Name\sourceepos... in\Release
et5.0-windows\snappy64.dll;C:\Users\User%20Name\sourceepos... in\Release
et5.0-windows....untimes\win
ative\snappy64.dll;C:\Users\User%20Name\sourceepos... in\Release
et5.0-windowsuntimes\win
ative\snappy64.dll.
{quote}
The request here [Can't make use of compression when application path contain space by jeremy-waguet · Pull Request #457 · mongodb/mongo-csharp-driver (github.com)|https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-csharp-driver/pull/457] does fix it. For now I have to disable compression on the connection string (to keep using official nuget packages)

summary: Test that session is unpinned when executing a non-transaction operation
Stable API Connection Examples for Docs
NullReferenceException when serializing an Id without a getter
description:
If an object has an Id property without a getter, attempting to serialize it to json will throw a NullReferenceException. This is caused by not checking if `GetMethod` is null here: https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-csharp-driver/blob/c8e76e5dd3c11683b5d99f56374754eb1e7ec792/src/MongoDB.Bson/Serialization/Conventions/NamedIdMemberConvention.cs#L114-L118.

I've attached a trivial repro that you can run and test locally.

summary: Use "hello" command when API Version is declared
NullReferenceException when saving an ExpandoObject property
Fix VersionedApiUnifiedTestRunner test failures
description: Running against "latest" variant, 70 Versioned API tests are failing.

summary: Force EG variant running all tests projects even some of them were failed
description:
Currently if any of test project fails (for example MongoDB.Bson.Tests), we simply skip the rest test projects (for example MongoDB.Driver.Core.Tests, and other). So we can improve tests reliability if we run all test suite regardless any previous failures in the run.

I did similar work in libmongocrypt [here|https://github.com/mongodb/libmongocrypt/blob/master/bindings/cs/Scripts/build.cake#L115]. We should consider this work for the driver solution as well.

summary: Convert CRUD v2 spec tests to unified test format
Clarify whether maxPoolSize allows 0 option or no
Test against 5.0 servers
Time-series Collection
Bump maxWireVersion for MongoDB 5.0
Implement missing test from Versioned API specification
Expose the Reason an Operation Fails Document Validation
Raise client error for snapshot sessions on <5.0 servers
Disable writes on snapshot sessions
Support 'let' option for aggregate command
Consider accepting EncryptionAlgorithm enum in EncryptOptions
description:
Currently algorithm value is string, and it differs from string value in spec.
Spec: AEAD_AES_256_CBC_HMAC_SHA_512-Deterministic
Driver: AEAD_AES_256_CBC_HMAC_SHA_512_Deterministic (last underscore)

Consider using enums for convenience.

summary: Calling cursor.next() and cursor.close() concurrently in Load Balanced mode uses the same connection simultaneously
Use "hello" command for monitoring if supported
Update libmongocrypt to latest mongocrypt.dll version
description: Due to bug fix in https://jira.mongodb.org/browse/MONGOCRYPT-321

summary: Skip tests that depend on the legacy wire protocol
description: In 5.1+ the server has removed support for the legacy wire protocol, but we have some integration tests that test it.  We should skip those tests on 5.1+ to get the build green on latest.

summary: Zstandard EG variant should set "zstd" as compression setup.
description: This [value |https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-csharp-driver/blob/master/evergreen/evergreen.yml#L1366]should be changed on "zstd"

summary: Temporary disable WriteError_details_should_expose_writeErrors_errInfo due to the server bug
Clean-up a stop step for LB and Serverless tests.
description: If the test task return error code 1, then the next steps are not launched which also means that LB are not stopped after the patch. We should fix it.

summary: Enable retryable writes tests on sharded cluster
Create a test to validate url options provided by EG
Provide explicit guidance on handling command errors that occur before the handshake completes during operation execution
Connection pools must be created and eventually marked ready for any server if a direct connection is used
Add test that ensures the error returned from being evicted from the WaitQueue is retryable
Increase `waitQueueTimeoutMS` in some tests to reduce the probability of timing out accidentally
Fix race condition in pool-clear-clears-waitqueue.yml
Ensure ConnectionCreatedEvents are emitted before ConnectionReadyEvents
description: See DRIVERS-1042 for updated details.
